query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(m.id) as media_count 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN media m ON p.id = m.projectId 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Forney%' OR p.name LIKE '%CIP222%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY media_count DESC;
